details.network_requests: 120 requests, 111 KB transferred, all 200/h2 except 101 WebSocket
details.page_functional: partially - UI responsive but chat stuck in loading state

analysis.observation: APF hold is NOW WORKING - request is being held (no response from Mistral server, confirming hold prevents upstream delivery). However, APF fails to send the warning response back to the client. The hold_release bug fix successfully prevents premature release, but the warning response generation/injection step is broken. The chat shows Mistral avatar with loading spinner indefinitely.
analysis.comparison_with_260: #260 (same settings but old hold code) → hold released prematurely, Mistral responded normally. #262 (hold_release fix) → hold works, request blocked, but no warning sent back. Progress: hold mechanism confirmed working.
analysis.comparison_with_261: #261 (h2_mode=1, no hold) → passthrough, no warning. #262 (h2_mode=2, hold fixed) → request held but warning not delivered.
analysis.verdict: HOLD WORKS but WARNING RESPONSE NOT SENT. The C++ hold_release bug fix successfully holds the request (confirmed by infinite wait). Next step: debug why the tRPC SSE warning response is not being generated and sent back to the client after hold.
